title: URL Preview icon
excerpt:
Description
I would like to upload a URL to a file column and see an Icon in the image library view, or ‘Card View’ currently it is just blank, nasty. 
What are you trying to achieve
A nicer user experience.

posts.author: Marcus_Millgate (Marcus Millgate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to upload a URL to a file column and see an Icon in the image library view, or ‘Card View’ currently it is just blank, nasty.

What are you trying to achieve

A nicer user experience.
